description: Microsoft OneDrive cloud storage integration for file upload, download, management, and sharing operations.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file to OneDrive storage.

name.description: The name of the file to be uploaded, including file extension.

content.description: The file content encoded as bytes.

parent_id.description: The unique identifier of the parent folder where the file will be stored. Defaults to root folder if not specified.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uploaded item in OneDrive.

name.description: The name of the uploaded file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

webUrl.description: The URL to access the file in the OneDrive web interface.

downloadUrl.description: The direct download URL for the file content.

createdDateTime.description: The timestamp when the file was created, in ISO 8601 format.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The timestamp when the file was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: upload_large_file
tools.description: Upload a large file to OneDrive using resumable upload sessions for reliable transfer of large content.

name.description: The name of the file to be uploaded, including file extension.

content.description: The file content encoded as bytes.

parent_id.description: The unique identifier of the parent folder where the file will be stored. Defaults to root folder if not specified.

chunk_size.description: The size of each upload chunk in bytes. Defaults to 5MB (5242880 bytes) for optimal performance.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uploaded item in OneDrive.

name.description: The name of the uploaded file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

webUrl.description: The URL to access the file in the OneDrive web interface.

upload_session_id.description: The identifier of the upload session used for the resumable upload.

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a file's content from OneDrive storage.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the item in OneDrive to download.

content.description: The downloaded file content as bytes.

name.description: The name of the downloaded file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the file content (e.g., application/pdf, image/png).

tools.name: list_children
tools.description: List all files and folders contained within a OneDrive directory.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the folder in OneDrive to list. Defaults to root folder if not specified.

top.description: The maximum number of items to return in the response. Defaults to 200.

value.description: The list of child items (files and folders) in the directory.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item in OneDrive.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

folder.description: Metadata indicating this item is a folder. Present only if the item is a folder.

file.description: Metadata indicating this item is a file. Present only if the item is a file.

webUrl.description: The URL to access the item in the OneDrive web interface.

createdDateTime.description: The timestamp when the item was created, in ISO 8601 format.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The timestamp when the item was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

@odata.nextLink.description: The URL to retrieve the next page of results if pagination is required.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific file or folder in OneDrive.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the item in OneDrive to retrieve.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item in OneDrive.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

webUrl.description: The URL to access the item in the OneDrive web interface.

downloadUrl.description: The temporary direct download URL for the file content, valid for a limited time.

createdDateTime.description: The timestamp when the item was created, in ISO 8601 format.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The timestamp when the item was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

parentReference.description: Reference information about the parent folder containing this item.

tools.name: create_share_link
tools.description: Generate a sharing link to grant access to a OneDrive item.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the item in OneDrive to share.

type.description: The type of sharing link to create: 'view' for read-only access, 'edit' for read-write access, or 'embed' for embeddable content. Defaults to 'view'.

scope.description: The scope of the sharing link: 'anonymous' allows anyone with the link to access, 'organization' restricts access to users within the organization. Defaults to 'anonymous'.

id.description: The unique identifier of the sharing permission.

roles.description: The list of permission roles granted by this sharing link.

type.description: The type of the sharing link (view, edit, or embed).

scope.description: The scope of the sharing link (anonymous or organization).

webUrl.description: The shareable URL that can be distributed to grant access to the item.

webHtml.description: The HTML embed code for the item. Present only when link type is 'embed'.
